testcases.input: s = "abc", shifts = [[0,1,0],[1,2,1],[0,2,1]] Output: "ace" Explanation: Firstly, shift the characters from index 0 to index 1 backward. Now s = "zac". Secondly, shift the characters from index 1 to index 2 forward. Now s = "zbd". Finally, shift the characters from index 0 to index 2 forward. Now s = "ace".
testcases.expectedOutput: "ace" Explanation: Firstly, shift the characters from index 0 to index 1 backward. Now s = "zac". Secondly, shift the characters from index 1 to index 2 forward. Now s = "zbd". Finally, shift the characters from index 0 to index 2 forward. Now s = "ace".

testcases.input: s = "dztz", shifts = [[0,0,0],[1,1,1]] Output: "catz" Explanation: Firstly, shift the characters from index 0 to index 0 backward. Now s = "cztz". Finally, shift the characters from index 1 to index 1 forward. Now s = "catz".
testcases.expectedOutput: "catz" Explanation: Firstly, shift the characters from index 0 to index 0 backward. Now s = "cztz". Finally, shift the characters from index 1 to index 1 forward. Now s = "catz".
